'''Vorzyd''' was the primary of the [[Vorzyd system/Legends|Vorzyd system]]. It was orbited by five [[Planet/Legends|planets]].

{{Star-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Vorzyd IV]] is mentioned to have several suns in ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Threat Within]]''.
